topic: Noah's Ark and the Great Flood

script.title: Noah's Ark and the Great Flood 🌈 | Bible Story for Kids

scenes.narration: Long ago, a kind man named Noah loved God with all his heart. God saw that Noah was good and faithful, and He had a very special plan just for him.
scenes.image_prompt: Colorful storybook illustration of an elderly man with a long white beard, Noah, kneeling in prayer in a sunny meadow surrounded by gentle animals, warm golden light, cheerful and bright

scenes.narration: God spoke to Noah and said, 'Build a great big boat called an ark!' Noah obeyed right away, swinging his hammer with a smile, day after day.
scenes.image_prompt: Cheerful storybook illustration of Noah and his family happily building a huge wooden ark, hammers in hand, bright blue sky, colorful and family-friendly

scenes.narration: Then God said, 'Bring two of every animal — big and small!' So elephants, lions, bunnies, and birds all marched two by two right up the ramp!
scenes.image_prompt: Bright, colorful storybook illustration of pairs of animals — elephants, giraffes, lions, bunnies, doves — happily walking two by two up a wide wooden ramp into the ark, cheerful sunny scene

scenes.narration: The rain began to fall — drip, drip, drip — then pour and pour! But inside the ark, Noah's family and all the animals were safe and warm.
scenes.image_prompt: Cozy storybook illustration showing the inside of the ark with Noah's family and smiling animals snuggled together warmly while rain falls outside the small round window, soft warm colors

scenes.narration: For forty days and forty nights the rain fell. The whole earth was covered in water. But God kept His promise, and the ark floated safely on the waves.
scenes.image_prompt: Beautiful storybook illustration of a large wooden ark floating peacefully on calm, glittering blue water under stormy clouds with a soft glow of light breaking through, hopeful and serene

scenes.narration: Then the rain stopped! Noah sent out a dove to look for dry land. The little dove came back carrying a green olive branch — good news at last!
scenes.image_prompt: Cheerful storybook illustration of a white dove flying back toward the ark carrying a bright green olive branch in its beak, soft blue sky beginning to clear, warm and hopeful colors

scenes.narration: The waters went down and the ark rested on a mountain. Noah and his family stepped out, and all the animals ran, hopped, and flew off into the world!
scenes.image_prompt: Joyful storybook illustration of Noah's family stepping off the ark onto green land, animals joyfully running and flying in every direction, mountains in the background, bright sunny day

scenes.narration: God put a beautiful rainbow in the sky as His promise — He would always care for us. Noah thanked God, and his heart was filled with joy and love.
scenes.image_prompt: Stunning storybook illustration of a huge colorful rainbow arching across a bright blue sky over Noah and his family with arms raised in joy, animals gathered around, lush green meadow, warm golden light
